description:
Overview:
Multi-functional, multi-purpose, double-sided-designed to be the only board you need. The blocks can be used on both sides, and the handle is engraved on the side for easy lifting.
It is thick and strong. It can be used as a cutting, shredding, carving board, heavy-duty cutting block or serving tray.
If properly cared for, this cutting board is more durable than most products in the kitchen.
Wood is a natural product, and its appearance naturally varies. Each cutting board has natural colors and patterns, which are very unique.

Specification
Material : Wood
Round size: 28cm in diameter
Rectangular small size: 33x22.8cm
Rectangular large size: 40x28cm
North American black walnut wood solid wood, use for a period of time for self-oil maintenance
The groove design prevents the sauce from overflowing, especially suitable as a steak plate, a plate, etc.

Package Content :
1 Pair x chopping board
